calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Property Titled In Name Of Another Is Property Of Trust Estate.
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Leutza for (petitioner) David Goldfarb.

Mr. Leutza stated that he is here on the 850 petition, that there is a question regarding the IRA accounts and that they cannot be transferred to a trust, clarified that they want to transfer the proceeds not the actual accounts into the trust and that the amount is between $100,000.00 to $200,000.00. The Court stated that IRA's do not belong in a trust. Mr. Leutza reiterated that it would just be the proceeds. The petition to determine property title in name of another is property of trust estate was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado: Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Property Titled In Name Of Another Is Property Of Trust Estate.
